title: Aurora Snail and The Whale Soft Toy, 61238, 7in, Grey, for Fans of The Book by Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler, Blue , 20 x 33 x 9 centimeters
features: Based on the characters in the book by Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler.
Great gift for children who love the book The Snail and the Whale
description: From the manufacturer AURORA Snail and The Whale Soft Toy, This is the perfect gift for anyone who enjoyed The snail and the whale book by Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler. The snail has hitched a ride on the back of her friend the whale so that they can see the world. Now you can take your two favourite characters with you on your adventures. The whale is super-soft and perfect for playtime, bedtime story and cuddles. The whale is blue grey with a stripy belly and the adorable snail has a peach coloured body with a brown shell like in the book. About us Established in 1981, Aurora World offers an extensive range of branded products for children and adults. The company sells its product lines via a wide variety of retailers including major zoos, department stores, high-end toy stores and top gift chains, as well as hospital gift shops, fine florists, candy stores and gift/stationary stores worldwide. Aurora is known in the industry for its incredibly high quality products, range of diverse offerings.
